error_access_denied: Access denied. This bot is private.
error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error_busy: Please wait, another operation is in progress.

error_no_wallet: Wallet not configured. Please go to Settings → Initialize Wallet first.
error_invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Please enter a positive number.
error_split_min_amount: Split amount is too small: {{amount}} USDC. Minimum: {{min}} USDC.
error_no_positions: You don't have any positions yet.
positions_onchain_api_key_hint: Tip: set ETHERSCAN_API_KEY in .env to enable on-chain positions fallback (not only Polymarket Data API).
error_no_orders: You don't have any orders yet.
error_no_condition_id: Market information not available. Please browse markets first.
strategy_markets_filter: Filter: YES ask <= {{maxAsk}} and NO ask <= {{maxAsk}}
strategy_markets_empty: No markets found for strategy filter (max ask: {{maxAsk}}).
events_filter_hint: Choose a preset or enter a custom YES price range.
events_filter_invalid: Invalid range. Use min-max where 0 <= min < max <= 1 (example: 0.15-0.85).
events_filter_return_hint: Tap Back to return to the same events list.
no_tradeable_markets: No tradeable markets in this event
select_market_first: Please select a market first to use {{action}}.
confirm_warning: ⚠️ Please confirm to execute this transaction.
split_confirm: Split {{amount}} USDC into YES + NO tokens?
merge_confirm: Merge {{amount}} shares of YES + NO back to USDC?
settings_strategy_invalid_stop_loss: Invalid stop-loss. Use a negative value in range -99..-0.01.
settings_strategy_invalid_take_profit: Invalid take-profit. Use a positive value in range 0.01..900.
settings_strategy_invalid_max_ask: Invalid max ask. Use a value in range 0.01..0.99.
settings_notifications_prompt_price_chan: Enter threshold from entry price % (e.g. 20). Current: {{current}}
settings_notifications_prompt_cooldown: Enter alert cooldown in seconds (0..86400). Current: {{current}}
settings_notifications_invalid_price_cha: Invalid threshold. Use a value in range 0.01..500.
settings_notifications_invalid_repeat_st: Invalid repeat step. Use a value in range 0.01..500.
settings_notifications_invalid_cooldown: Invalid cooldown. Use an integer in range 0..86400.
export_pk_warning:
?? SECURITY WARNING

This will display your private key. Anyone who sees it can steal your funds.

Export and store it securely: reinstalling OS or moving to another device may cause wallet access loss.

Continue?
export_pk_enter_password: Type "confirm" to display your private key:
export_pk_sent_will_delete: 🔐 Your private key: {{privateKey}} ⚠️ This message will be automatically deleted in 90 seconds for security.
export_pk_wallet_missing: Wallet not initialized. Please initialize a wallet first.

withdraw_invalid_address: Invalid address. Address must start with 0x and be a valid Ethereum address.

Confirm withdrawal of {{amount}} USDC to address:
{{address}}
withdraw_invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Enter a positive number.
withdraw_enter_amount_or_use_percent: Enter amount or use percentage of balance:
wallet_not_configured_help: Wallet not configured. Go to Settings → Initialize Wallet to start trading.
limit_invalid_price: Invalid price. Enter a number between 0 and 1.
strategy_use_positions: Open Positions and use "Start Strategy" on a position.
limit_enter_usdc: Enter amount in USDC for limit {{action}} ({{side}}):
limit_amount_too_small: Amount is too small for this limit price.
limit_min_size: Limit order is too small. Minimum size: {{min}} shares.
strategy_close_confirm:
Close strategy #{{id}} for market "{{market}}"?

The bot will cancel TP/SL orders, try merge, then market-close remaining legs.
strategy_close_partial: Strategy #{{id}} close started, but some legs remain open. Fallback stop orders were posted where possible.
settings_backup_warning: Backup reminder: export your private key. Reinstalling OS or moving to another device may cause wallet access loss.
